title: Chinese hackers pose biggest espionage threat to tech firms, CrowdStrike says
description: China-linked hackers presented the largest espionage threat to technology firms in the past year. This surge coincides with significant investments in artificial intelligence. The technology sector remains a prime target for foreign governments and cybercriminals. North Korean, Russian, and Iranian hacking groups also pose threats. Financially motivated cybercriminals also increased their targeting of tech firms.

title: Chinese hackers pose biggest espionage threat to tech firms, CrowdStrike says
description: China-linked hackers posed the biggest espionage threat to technology companies over the past year, CrowdStrike, a cybersecurity firm, said in a report published on Tuesday, amid surging investment in artificial intelligence.
content:
The hacking ​campaigns align with the Chinese government’s strategic priorities and a sustained interest in technology ‌development, intellectual property, and information with strategic and economic value, the firm said.

title: ZenaTech Added to Russell 3000® Index, Marking Major Milestone in Company's Growth and Market Recognition
description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia, June 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- ZenaTech, Inc. (Nasdaq: ZENA) (FSE: 49Q) (BMV: ZENA) ('ZenaTech'), a technology solution provider specializing in AI (Artificial Intelligence) drone, Drone as a Service (DaaS), enterprise SaaS, and Quantum Computing solutions, today announces the company been added as a member of the broad-market Russell 3000® Index effective at market open on June 29, 2026, as part of the first 2026 Russell indexes reconstitution. The inclusion reflects ZenaTech’s continued growth and market capitalization and is expected to broaden the Company’s credibility and exposure to investors, including institutional investors, ETFs, and index funds that track Russell small-cap companies.

title: Global Market Surge Amid Tech Excitement and Oil Price Dip
description: Global stocks rose as technology shares gained and oil prices fell amid a temporary truce between Israel and Iran. Artificial intelligence excitement surged with OpenAI's filing for a U.S. IPO and SpaceX's upcoming market debut. Rising borrowing costs remain a concern as U.S. bond yields climb.

title: IIT Roorkee Opens Admissions for the 11th Batch of its Post Graduate Certificate in Data Science, Machine Learning & Generative AI
description: Roorkee (Uttarakhand) [India], June 9: The Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee has opened admissions for the 11th batch of its Post Graduate Certificate in Data Science, Machine Learning & Generative AI, an advanced professional programme created for learners seeking a rigorous and application-led understanding of artificial intelligence and data-led technologies. The curriculum brings together the foundations of data science, machine learning, deep learning, Generative AI and MLOps, enabling participants to develop the capabilities required to design, build and deploy intelligent solutions in contemporary business environments.

title: Booming AI Demand Fuels Jump in China’s Exports: Supply Lines
description: China’s exports jumped more than 19% from a year earlier as booming demand for artificial intelligence hardware offsets disruptions from the war in Iran.
content:
China’s exports jumped more than 19% from a year earlier as booming demand for artificial intelligence hardware offsets disruptions from the war in Iran.
